prompt:
Subject: 
Jumping in the midsummer blue sky

Person/Expression: 
A woman with a sense of transparency, a bright smile, wide eyes, slightly rosy cheeks, natural and cute Japanese-style makeup, high black pigtails, hair ends fluttering strongly in the wind, energetic and idol-like atmosphere.

Clothing/Pose: 
Girly outfit, short top and mini skirt with plenty of light pink and white frills, ribbon and lace decorations, white high socks, cute sneakers, the moment of leaping into the air while lightly supporting the back of a black chair with one hand, the other arm extended upwards, a dynamic and natural jump with legs wide open.

Background/Lighting: 
Midsummer park, lawn and lush green trees, clear blue sky with almost no clouds, bright sunny day with strong sunlight pouring down, sun shining in the upper left of the screen, overall very bright and refreshing atmosphere.

Composition/Camera: 
Vertical composition, low angle, dynamic composition capturing the whole body, wide-angle feel, emphasizing the floating sensation of the jump, using a large amount of empty sky space, capturing a dynamic moment.

Texture/Style: 
Realistic photographic expression, high definition, 4K, natural skin texture, sharp and clear summer colors, transparency, cleanliness, fresh and vital Japanese-style portrait, bright pop and cute finish.

Negative: 
Low quality, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted limbs, broken joints, collapsed face, strange gaze, asymmetrical eyes, body twisting, unnatural jump, unnatural clothing wrinkles, overexposure, text, logo, watermark, unnecessary background objects, AI-specific unnatural texture.
